allow: Bash(sed -i 's/condivisione: false, remoteVer: 0,/condivisione: false, remoteVer: 0, inAttesaSent: false,/g' resources/js/services/liveKitCall.ts)
Bash(sed -i 's/    inAttesa?:          boolean;/    inAttesa?:          boolean;\\n    messaggioAttesa?:   string;/g' resources/js/Pages/Kiosk/Index.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/chioscoNome: opts.chioscoNome, stato: '\\''error'\\''/chioscoNome: opts.chioscoNome, hotelId: opts.hotelId, stato: '\\''error'\\''/; s/chioscoNome: opts.chioscoNome, stato: '\\''connecting'\\''/chioscoNome: opts.chioscoNome, hotelId: opts.hotelId, stato: '\\''connecting'\\''/' resources/js/services/liveKitCall.ts)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/chioscoId: chiosco\\.id, chioscoNome: chiosco\\.nome,/chioscoId: chiosco.id, chioscoNome: chiosco.nome, hotelId: chiosco.hotel_id,/g' resources/js/Components/Portineria/AreaVideo.tsx)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\$hotelId = \\$request->get\\\('\\''hotel_id'\\''\\\);\\n\(\\s*\)if \\\(! \\$hotelId \\|\\| ! in_array\\\(\\$hotelId, \\$hotelIds, true\\\)\\\) \\{\\n\\s*\\$hotelId = \\$hotelIds\\[0\\] \\?\\? null;\\n\\s*\\}/\\$hotelId = \\$request->get\('\\''hotel_id'\\''\);\\n${1}if \(! \\$hotelId || ! in_array\(\\$hotelId, \\$hotelIds, true\)\) {\\n${1}    \\$sess = \\$request->session\(\)->get\('\\''hotel_corrente_id'\\''\);\\n${1}    \\$hotelId = in_array\(\\$sess, \\$hotelIds, true\) ? \\$sess : \(\\$hotelIds[0] ?? null\);\\n${1}}/g' app/Http/Controllers/Regolamento/RegolamentoController.php)
